positive: A stylized, abstract geometric celestial map featuring interconnected constellations and zodiac symbols drawn with thin, elegant lines. The primary color palette is deep indigo, luminous teal, and metallic gold accents. The composition should be balanced and symmetrical, suitable for repeating or central apparel placement. Elements include stylized moons, crescent planets, and abstract mythological beasts forming constellations, rendered in a clean, minimalist silhouette style against a deep space background. High contrast, vector-art quality, perfect symmetry, graphic design, celestial blueprint, cosmic elegance, isolated on a solid dark background.
